title: pi-bash-sandbox Configuration
description: Configuration for pi-bash-sandbox - secure bash command execution with bubblewrap sandboxing

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this configuration file

mounts.description: Additional filesystem paths to bind into the sandbox (additive to default mounts)

additionalProperties.description: Access mode for the mount point

env.description: Custom environment variables to set in the sandbox (does not inherit from parent process)

inheritEnv.description: Filter for which existing environment variables to pass from the parent process

additionalProperties.description: Whether to allow or deny inheritance of this variable

homeMounts.description: Controls which files from the home directory are mounted into the sandbox

oneOf.description: true for default mounts (.bashrc, .bash_profile, .local, .config), false to disable all
Custom array of home paths to mount (relative to ~)

permissions.description: Command permission patterns (evaluated on last-match basis)

audit.description: Configuration for the audit command's model analysis
